enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Ailasa Ailasa?

The song is sung by Anirudh Ravichander and Suchitra.

Which movie features the song Ailasa Ailasa?

The song is from the Tamil movie Vanakkam Chennai.

Who composed the music for Ailasa Ailasa?

The music was composed by Anirudh Ravichander.

What is the theme of the song Ailasa Ailasa?

The song portrays a lively and romantic atmosphere, celebrating love and joy.

When was the movie Vanakkam Chennai released?

The movie was released in the year 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ailasa Ailasa from the Tamil movie Vanakkam Chennai (2013) features the lead pair Shiva and Priya Anand. Composed by Anirudh Ravichander with lyrics by Madhan Karky, this duet sung by Anirudh and Suchitra is an energetic celebration of love and joy. The vibrant beats and catchy lyrics make it a perfect choice for parties and festive occasions. The song captures the youthful spirit and the excitement of new beginnings, resonating with audiences of all ages.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ailasa Ailasa, a vibrant and energetic track from the movie Vanakkam Chennai, showcases the musical brilliance of Anirudh Ravichander and the lyrical finesse of Madhan Karky. Sung by Anirudh and Suchitra, this song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and celebration. Dive into this captivating number that perfectly blends catchy beats with heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa
In your heart, if you look at the distance, what will happen to me?
Without considering the truth, if you put me aside, I can't say anything because I can't hear your eyes.
When the time comes, love won't be there.
Oh, just go away, just go away, the sky is empty, just go away, just go away, the sinful heart is being troubled.
Ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa
Today, I saw love change, and I couldn't hear my heart speaking about the path of truth. Today, there is a storm in my eyes, and I am going towards the direction of that storm.
Don't listen wrongly, I can't say anything if you do. If you look at the sound, love won't be there either.
Oh, just go away, just go away, the sky is empty, just go away, just go away, the sinful heart is being troubled.
Ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa ailasa
